storyboard.title: Signal field
storyboard.purpose: Establish a noisy synthetic production alert and isolate one thread of attention.

storyboard.title: Connected surface
storyboard.purpose: Turn the alert into a clear service map and show an interaction revealing its route and deployment.

storyboard.title: Release to timeline
storyboard.purpose: Carry the linked release into one incident timeline containing the relevant evidence types.

storyboard.title: Rest
storyboard.purpose: Resolve the visual argument into Relay and the required closing line.
